name: KMA Global Solutions International, Inc.
summary: KMA Global Solutions International, Inc. manufactures and supplies electronic article surveillance source tagging solutions for customers the apparel, multimedia, sporting goods, food, pharmaceutical, and general merchandise industries worldwide. Its products include NEXTag acousto-magnetic and NEXTag radio frequency sew-on labels, DualTags, grocery labels, hang tags, wrap tags, foamback labels, and sunglasses tags. The company was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Mississauga, Canada.
